result:
I marked **"Review PR #42"** (id: 5) as done.

**Why this one?** There were 3 pending todos:

| ID | Title | Priority |
|----|-------|----------|
| 4 | Call dentist | low |
| 5 | Review PR #42 | **medium** |
| 7 | Plan sprint | **medium** |

No pending todos had `high` priority (those were already done). Among the pending ones, ids 5 and 7 were both `medium` — the highest priority available. I picked **Review PR #42** since it was created first (oldest medium-priority pending item).
